visuals.title: Legacy Collection Class Hierarchy
visuals.description: Visual diagram for Legacy Collection Class Hierarchy
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Legacy Classes and Interfaces</text>
  
  <!-- Legacy Interface -->
  <rect x="50" y="70" width="120" height="50" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="95" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    LegacyInterface
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="110" y="110" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="white" opacity="0">
    + legacyMethod()
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Legacy Base Class -->
  <rect x="250" y="70" width="120" height="50" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="310" y="95" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    LegacyBaseClass
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="310" y="110" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="white" opacity="0">
    + oldMethod()
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Concrete Legacy Class -->
  <rect x="150" y="150" width="120" height="50" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="175" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    ConcreteLegacyClass
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="210" y="190" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="white" opacity="0">
    + implementLegacy()
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Inheritance Arrow -->
  <path d="M210,120 L210,150" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Implementation Arrow -->
  <path d="M170,120 L130,150" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" stroke-dasharray="5,5" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  
  <!-- Arrowhead marker definition -->
  <defs>
    <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
  
  <!-- Labels -->
  <text x="100" y="45" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Interface
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <text x="310" y="45" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Base Class
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <text x="210" y="210" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Implementation
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
